issues.title: Truncated context blocks critical files
issues.why: The provided context is truncated at 136KB, cutting off the end of 02-consolidated-audit-findings/98-changelog.md and potentially missing 99-consistency-report.md for that sub-module.
issues.fix: Ensure the audit walker provides the full content of all 12 files in the module to resolve internal consistency.

issues.title: Inconsistent Severity Enums between trackers
issues.why: Sub-module 01 uses {blocker, major, minor, info} in its Phase 50 contract, while sub-module 02 uses {Critical, High, Medium, Low} per AC-AI-14.
issues.fix: Standardize all trackers in spec/25 to use the closed set {Critical, High, Medium, Low} defined in AC-AI-14.

issues.title: Ambiguous 'Phase 153' references
issues.why: The spec frequently references 'Phase 153' and 'Lesson #NN' which are external process artifacts not fully defined in the provided context.
issues.fix: Add a brief glossary or link to a 'Process Fundamentals' module that defines Phase and Lesson terminology.
